evidenceSnippetOriginal: External custom GPTs should not be used to process confidential University data or sensitive personal data. If you are considering inputting internal University data to an external custom GPT, please discuss this with the Information Security GRC team in advance. Any inputting of personal data to an external custom GPT should also be discussed with the Information Compliance team.
